name: QUANTUM X LABS INC.
business: The company operates a digital advertising platform (Search Platform) that automates, optimizes and monetizes online campaigns for advertisers and search engines. Through its subsidiary Quantum, it develops quantum algorithms for transportation, drug discovery, security, and GPS replacement. Through Metagramm, it offers AI-based writing assistance tools on a subscription basis.

exposures.sentence: The Company, through its wholly-owned subsidiary, Quantum, is focused on developing and promoting quantum algorithms for the transportation, drug discovery and security segments as well as developing quantum-based GPS replacement and quantum atom accuracy solutions.
Quantum X Labs is an early-stage company and has a limited operating history, which makes it difficult to forecast its future results of operations.
Metagramm specializes in developing advanced writing assistance tools that leverage artificial intelligence, machine learning and natural language processing technologies.

Our implementation and use of artificial intelligence technologies may not be successful, which may impair our ability to compete effectively, result in reputational harm and have an adverse effect on our business.
Viewbix is a digital advertising platform that develops and markets a variety of technological platforms that automate, optimize and monetize digital online campaigns.
We may not be able to protect our systems, technology and infrastructure from cyberattacks.

catalysts.sentence: The transaction closed on March 4, 2026 (the Quantum Closing Date) and resulted in us acquiring 100% of Quantum’s issued and outstanding share capital on a fully diluted and post-closing basis and Quantum becoming a majority-owned subsidiary of Viewbix.
The November 2025 Private Placement closed on March 4, 2026 (the Closing Date).
Our shares of common stock began trading under the symbol VBIX on The Nasdaq Capital Market on June 5, 2025 (the Uplist).
The transaction closed on March 24, 2025 and resulted in Metagramm becoming a wholly-owned subsidiary of Viewbix.
The Cortex Sale was signed and closed on November 9, 2025 (the Cortex Closing).

catalysts.event: Earn-out milestone: submission of five patent applications
catalysts.sentence: the issuance of up to 1,975,998 Earn-Out Securities upon the submission of five (5) patent applications including provisional applications in total, across at least three (3) distinct sub-fields within the quantum sector, by the Quantum or any of its Portfolio Companies (as defined in the Quantum Exchange Agreement) during the 18-month period following the Quantum Closing Date

catalysts.event: Earn-out milestone: listing, offering, or M&A of Portfolio Company at $20M+ valuation
catalysts.sentence: the issuance of up to 3,436,519 Earn-Out Securities upon the closing of listing, public offering, or an M&A Transaction (as defined in the Quantum Exchange Agreement) of any Portfolio Company of Quantum, at a pre-money valuation of no less than $20 million during the twenty four-month period following the Quantum Closing Date

catalysts.event: Earn-out milestone: capital raise or M&A at $250M+ valuation
catalysts.sentence: the issuance of up to 7,290,330 Earn-Out Securities upon the earlier of: (1) a capital raise of at least $10 million into either Viewbix or Quantum at a pre-money valuation of no less than $250 million; or (2) closing of any M&A Transaction of Quantum, at a pre-money valuation not less than $250 million during the 48-month period following the Quantum Closing Date
